ops.title: Tinker wall-clock speedup: pipeline train_lora + concurrent val scoring + recipe knobs (investigation complete, ready to implement)

ops.text: train_lora submits forward_backward+optim_step together and keeps 1-2 steps in flight (cookbook submit_ahead pattern); losses/checkpoint semantics unchanged; tests green
score_auc_tinker and score_rows_tinker gather their compute_logprobs concurrently instead of per-row .result() draining
a real retrain's steps/hour is measured against the 800-1330/hr baseline band and journaled
